_comment: Deployments-API payload for the daily AI brief's Managed Agents scheduled deployment.
Source-of-truth per docs/adr/0006 FR-16/AC-15 — this file is what defines the
schedule and which self-hosted environment/agent it targets. It is NOT applied
automatically by this CDK stack; create/update the deployment via the Deployments
API or Claude Console using this file's values (see deploy/managed-agent/README.md).
Built against beta header: managed-agents-2026-04-01 (PRD FR-2). If Anthropic
changes this API surface, this file's shape may need to change too — the
deployment must fail loudly, not silently skip, if the platform contract changes

agent._comment: References the agent definition created via the Claude Console/API (docs/adr/0007). The agent's initial prompt is intentionally thin — it orchestrates, delegating substance to the committed skill file.
agent.initial_prompt: Run today's daily AI brief pipeline: research per the daily-ai-brief skill, write and validate the Markdown brief, derive the HTML and the speech-optimized listening script, then run the audio/email step (Polly synthesis + SES owner copy + subscriber fan-out) exactly as deploy/audio_email.py does today.

environment._comment: The self_hosted environment id created via the Claude Console after the CDK stack (ManagedAgentSandboxStack) is deployed and its webhook is registered. See README step 2.

schedule._comment: Matches today's weekday 6:07 AM local run (docs/adr/0006). CONFIRM the owner's actual local timezone before deploy -- America/Los_Angeles is this ADR's assumption, not independently re-verified against the owner's Mac locale.

_manual_steps_not_encoded_here: Creating the agent (agent_id) and the self_hosted environment (environment_id) via the Claude Console/API.
Registering deploy/managed-agent's WebhookUrl stack output with Anthropic for session.status_run_started.
Generating and populating the environment key + webhook signing secret into the two Secrets Manager secrets this CDK stack creates empty.
Building and pushing the microVM container image (deploy/managed-agent/microvm/) via the reference implementation's build-image.sh-equivalent flow.
Actually calling the Deployments API (or Console) with this file's schedule/agent/environment values to create or update the live scheduled deployment.
See deploy/managed-agent/README.md for the full, ordered runbook.
